message:
feat(stdlib): fix os module type inference and enable os.getcwd/path

- Add os to import_registry as zig_runtime module
- Remove os from stdlib skip list to enable dispatch
- Add type inference for os.getcwd (string), os.listdir (unknown)
- Add type inference for os.path.exists/isfile/isdir (bool)
- Add type inference for os.path.join/dirname/basename (string)
- Update os.zig codegen to return []const u8 instead of PyObject
- Outputs match Python exactly

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Test os module
+import os
+
+# Test getcwd
+cwd = os.getcwd()
+print("Current dir:", cwd)
+
+# Test os.path functions
+test_path = "/Users/steven_chong/test/file.txt"
+dirname = os.path.dirname(test_path)
+print("dirname:", dirname)
+
+basename = os.path.basename(test_path)
+print("basename:", basename)
+
+joined = os.path.join("/Users", "steven_chong", "test")
+print("joined:", joined)
+
+exists = os.path.exists(".")
+print("exists .:", exists)
